texto: Apart from boosting our long-term economic strength like other Asian economic powers, Philippine companies expanding overseas and going beyond our comfort zones, or going to some uncharted territories, will help sharpen our management skills.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Andrew Tan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Apart from boosting our long-term economic strength like other Asian economic powers, Philippine …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, management, help pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de help e comfort.
